posts.content: NASA (@NASA) on Xstalk: Liftoff.The Artemis II mission launched from @NASAKennedy at 6:35pm ET (2235 UTC), propelling four astronauts on a journey around the Moon.Artemis II will pave the way for future Moon landings, as well as the next giant leap — astronauts on Mars. / Xstalk
Matt Dominick's X Account: A Visual Journey From Space

NASA (@NASA) on Xstalk: It’s not a straight shot to the far side of the Moon! 🌕Over approximately 10 days, the Artemis II astronauts will orbit Earth twice before looping around the far side of the Moon in a figure eight and returning home. / Xstalk
